story_title: Conduct Root-Cause Analysis for Relevance Drop
description: Conduct a root-cause analysis to identify the factors contributing to the 15% drop in search relevance scores for anonymous users following the v2.4.1 deployment.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the search relevance score data WHEN the analysis is complete THEN a report detailing the findings and recommendations is produced.

description: Adjust the cache TTL for autocomplete suggestions from 7 days back to 24 hours to ensure users receive relevant and timely suggestions.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the autocomplete cache settings WHEN the TTL is adjusted THEN suggestions are updated every 24 hours.

description: Profile the search latency on mobile and optimize the ranking model or implement mobile-specific caching to reduce the P95 latency from 890ms to below 600ms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the mobile search latency data WHEN optimizations are applied THEN the P95 latency is reduced to below 600ms.

story_title: Implement Instrumentation for New Search Features
description: Add analytics instrumentation for image search and voice search to track user interactions and performance metrics.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new search features WHEN instrumentation is implemented THEN analytics events for image and voice search are recorded.

story_title: Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search
description: Define and implement baseline metrics for image search, including query volume, zero-result rate, and click-through rate to measure its effectiveness.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the image search feature WHEN baseline metrics are established THEN metrics for query volume, zero-result rate, and click-through rate are available.

story_title: Conduct A/B Testing for Ranking Algorithm
description: Design and execute a new A/B test specifically targeting anonymous users to evaluate the impact of the ranking algorithm on their search relevance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new A/B test is designed WHEN it is executed THEN results for anonymous users are collected and analyzed.

description: Implement monitoring and alerting for search relevance scores to proactively identify and address drops in performance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is implemented WHEN relevance scores drop significantly THEN alerts are triggered.

story_title: Collect User Feedback on Search Experience
description: Implement a mechanism to collect user feedback specifically from anonymous users regarding their search experience to inform future improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is implemented WHEN anonymous users provide feedback THEN their responses are collected and analyzed.

description: Update the search analytics dashboard to include metrics for new features like image and voice search, providing visibility into their performance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is updated WHEN new features are added THEN their metrics are displayed correctly.

story_title: Implement Error Handling for Search Queries
description: Develop robust error handling for search queries to ensure users receive meaningful feedback when queries fail or return zero results.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a search query fails WHEN the error handling is triggered THEN a user-friendly error message is displayed.

description: Revise the search documentation to reflect changes made in the v2.4.1 deployment and provide guidance on new features and metrics.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the documentation is updated WHEN new features are added THEN the documentation accurately reflects those changes.

story_title: Search autocomplete suggestions showing stale data
description: Autocomplete suggestions are sourced from a cache refreshed every 24 hours. Since v2.4.1 the cache TTL was inadvertently extended to 7 days due to a config change in the deployment pipeline. Users are seeing suggestions for products that are out of stock or promotions that have ended. The stale data is compounding the relevance problem — users click an autocomplete suggestion and land on a zero-result page.
